mapper.sql: ID, USER_ID, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_PHONE, PROVINCE, DISTRICT, WARD, STREET_DETAIL, IS_DEFAULT
mapper.select: SELECT FROM APP_USER_ADDRESSES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY IS_DEFAULT DESC, ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APP_USER_ADDRESSES ( USER_ID, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_PHONE, PROVINCE, DISTRICT, WARD, STREET_DETAIL, IS_DEFAULT ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{receiverName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{province, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{district, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ward, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{streetDetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDefault, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_USER_ADDRESSES SET RECEIVER_NAME = #{receiverName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RECEIVER_PHONE = #{receiverPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROVINCE = #{province, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DISTRICT = #{district, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WARD = #{ward, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STREET_DETAIL = #{streetDetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_DEFAULT = #{isDefault, jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM APP_USER_ADDRESSES WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
